mnemonics: COMPUTE LINGO: COMPUtational LINGuistics for Natural language prOcessing
NLP Steps: Tokenize → Tag → Parse → Analyze → Generate (TTPAG)
Remember POS: People Often Vanish After Eating Carrots (Pronoun, Adverb, Verb, Adjective, Conjunction, Noun)
keyPoints: NLP bridges human language and computer understanding through computational models
Key NLP tasks include tokenization, part-of-speech tagging, parsing, semantic analysis, and text generation
Statistical and machine learning approaches dominate modern NLP systems
commonMistakes: Confusing syntactic parsing (grammar structure) with semantic analysis (meaning interpretation)
Assuming NLP systems understand language like humans rather than statistically pattern matching
Overlooking the importance of context in disambiguating word meanings and references
